name: codemap
description: Analyze codebase structure, dependencies, changes, risk, matched skills, and cross-agent handoffs.

interface.shortDescription: Code-aware context and skill routing for local repos
interface.longDescription: Use Codemap to inspect project structure, trace dependencies, evaluate change risk, match task-specific skills, and build cross-agent handoffs.
defaultPrompt: Show me this project's structure and hub files.
What changed on this branch and what looks risky?
Build a Codemap handoff for the next agent.
